Kottbusser Straße 11

10999 Berlin

Germany

Account Name: INTAPP GERMANY GMBH Account Number: 22305013 Account Currency: EUR Bank Name: Bank of America Europe Designated Activity Company, Frankfurt branch IBAN: DE59500109000022305013 Branch Swift Address: BOFADEFX
Please note: Payments in currencies other than EUR must be submitted via Wire Transfer. Payments in EUR can be processed via Wire or ACH.
